dataflow.name: Autark GPU shader
dataflow.description: WebGPU compute via AutkGrammar: per-road lane-count normalisation on Chicago Loop OSM roads, rendered as a thematic map linked to a brushable histogram.
dataflow.task: Load Chicago Loop OSM layers, run a GPU compute step that normalises each road segment's lane count, colour roads by the result, and explore with a brushable histogram.

nodes.goal: Load Chicago Loop OSM, run GPU compute to normalise lane count per road, render thematic map linked to brushable histogram.
